testimonial.title:
What our clients
say about us

seo.title: AI Chatbot
seo.description: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 powered AI chatbot integrated with LMS. 24/7 automated learner support with FAQ auto-learning and multi-language capabilities.
seo.keywords: AI chatbot, LMS chatbot, e-learning chatbot, GPT chatbot, learning chatbot

hero.title: e-Learning Specialized
hero.desc: Reduce operational costs and dramatically improve learner satisfaction with an AI chatbot that responds to learner questions 24/7.

features.title: LLM-based NLU
features.desc: Leverages the latest large language models (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5) to generate context-aware, accurate responses with RAG technology.

features.title: LMS-integrated Responses
features.desc: Real-time integration with LMS via REST API to provide personalized responses based on enrollment, assignments, grades, and attendance.

features.title: Auto FAQ & Knowledge Base
features.desc: Upload existing FAQ docs, manuals, and syllabi to auto-index via vector embeddings for an instant, high-accuracy knowledge base.

features.title: Multi-language Support
features.desc: Auto-detects and responds in 10+ languages including Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese.

features.title: Multi-channel Deployment
features.desc: Deploy a single chatbot across KakaoTalk, website widget, and mobile app SDK simultaneously.

features.title: Operations Dashboard
features.desc: Visualize KPIs like question classification, resolution rate, escalation ratio, CSAT, and avg response time in real-time.

features.title: Security & Privacy
features.desc: Encrypted transmission (TLS 1.3) for learner data. Conversation logs collected with user consent, compliant with privacy laws and GDPR.

features.title: Continuous Learning
features.desc: Periodic fine-tuning based on real conversation data improves response accuracy over time.

features.title: Agent Escalation
features.desc: Complex inquiries are seamlessly transferred to human agents with full conversation context preserved.

midCTA.heading: Curious about the right AI chatbot for your organization?
midCTA.description: We'll propose a customized chatbot solution for free.

process.title: Requirements Analysis & Design
process.desc: Deep analysis of organizational characteristics, learner inquiry patterns, and integration systems to design chatbot architecture.

process.title: Data Collection & AI Training
process.desc: Collect and refine organizational documents like FAQs and course materials, then convert to vector embeddings.
process.detail: Doc Parsing · Vector DB · RAG Pipeline

process.title: Development & QA
process.desc: Develop chatbot engine and integrate with LMS/channels, then test 100+ edge case scenarios.

process.title: Deployment & Ongoing Support
process.desc: Deploy across all channels with monthly performance reports and periodic fine-tuning.

faqs.q: Can I use existing FAQs right after chatbot deployment?
faqs.a: Yes, upload your FAQ documents and they'll be auto-indexed via vector embeddings for immediate use.

faqs.q: How are unanswered questions handled?
faqs.a: The fallback scenario automatically suggests 'Connect to Agent' or 'Submit Inquiry' options.

faqs.q: Can it be applied to both KakaoTalk and website?
faqs.a: Yes, a single chatbot engine can be deployed to KakaoTalk, website, and mobile app simultaneously.

faqs.q: Is learner personal information protected?
faqs.a: Yes, with TLS 1.3 encryption, data masking, and consent-based log collection, compliant with privacy laws and GDPR.

faqs.q: How is chatbot response accuracy managed?
faqs.a: Through monthly fine-tuning and feedback loops for continuous improvement.

testimonials.name: J. Kim
testimonials.content: Honestly, I wasn't sure how much a chatbot could do, but within 2 weeks it was handling almost all repetitive questions.

testimonials.name: D. Lee
testimonials.content: Many learners ask questions at night or on weekends. The chatbot's instant responses have noticeably improved completion rates.

testimonials.name: S. Oh
testimonials.content: With chatbots on both KakaoTalk and the website, learners can ask questions wherever they're comfortable.

seo.title: Application Development
seo.description: iOS and Android app development perfectly integrated with Webheads LMS.
seo.keywords: e-learning app, LMS app, iOS app, Android app, React Native, Flutter

hero.title: From Perfect LMS Integration to
hero.desc: Build learning apps perfectly integrated with Webheads e-learning solutions, plus commerce, booking, internal tools, and more.

lmsFeaturesSection.title:
Perfectly Integrated with
Webheads e-Learning
lmsFeaturesSection.desc: If you're already using Webheads LMS, deliver the same learning experience in your app without additional setup.

lmsFeatures.title: Webheads LMS Integration
lmsFeatures.desc: Real-time bidirectional integration with Webheads via REST API and WebSocket.

lmsFeatures.title: Learning Push Notifications
lmsFeatures.desc: Auto-send study reminders and assignment deadlines via FCM/APNs at optimal timing per learner.

lmsFeatures.title: Mobile DRM Video Security
lmsFeatures.desc: Block illegal recording and capture with Widevine (Android) and FairPlay (iOS) DRM.

lmsFeatures.title: Offline Learning Support
lmsFeatures.desc: Local caching enables uninterrupted learning even in unstable network environments.

lmsFeatures.title: Learning Analytics & Progress
lmsFeatures.desc: Visualize 30+ metrics including study time, progress rate, and quiz scores in the app dashboard.

lmsFeatures.title: Security & SSO
lmsFeatures.desc: OAuth 2.0/SAML 2.0 based SSO for instant app login with a single Webheads LMS account.

midCTA.heading: Wondering what app your organization needs?
midCTA.description: We'll propose a customized app development plan for free.

otherAppsSection.title:
Beyond e-Learning,
We Build All Kinds of Apps
otherAppsSection.desc: Custom apps for commerce, booking, internal tools, community, and more — built for iOS and Android simultaneously.

otherApps.title: Commerce & Marketplace
otherApps.desc: Full-stack commerce apps with product listing, payment, shipping tracking, and reviews.

otherApps.title: Booking & Schedule Mgmt
otherApps.desc: Booking management apps for classrooms, meeting rooms, medical appointments, and more.

otherApps.title: Internal & Groupware
otherApps.desc: Custom internal apps for attendance, approvals, company notices, and more.

otherApps.title: Community & Social
otherApps.desc: From SNS-style feeds and chat to professional community apps.

devStack.title: iOS / Android Native
devStack.desc: Native apps with Swift (iOS) and Kotlin (Android) that fully comply with platform guidelines.

devStack.title: Hybrid / Cross-platform
devStack.desc: Build iOS and Android simultaneously from a single codebase with React Native or Flutter.

devStack.title: App Store Deployment & Maintenance
devStack.desc: Full-service App Store and Google Play submission including review handling.

faqs.q: Does developing for both iOS and Android cost double?
faqs.a: No. With React Native or Flutter cross-platform development, you can save 30-40% compared to separate native development.

faqs.q: Do you handle App Store/Google Play submission?
faqs.a: Yes, we handle the entire process including screenshots, metadata, review responses, and rejection fixes.

faqs.q: Can an existing web LMS be converted to an app?
faqs.a: Yes, if you're using Webheads LMS, we can quickly build an app with existing data integration via REST API. Average 4-week MVP delivery.

faqs.q: Is post-launch maintenance available?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide ongoing maintenance including app updates, bug fixes, OS update responses, and feature additions.

faqs.q: Does offline learning work for all content?
faqs.a: Offline download permissions can be configured per content item based on DRM policies. Downloaded content retains DRM encryption.

testimonials.name: M. Ko
testimonials.content: We built both iOS and Android apps, and learners can seamlessly continue from web to app.

testimonials.name: J. Nam
testimonials.content: After enabling push notifications, app return rates significantly increased.

testimonials.name: D. Hwang
testimonials.content: We got our MVP on the App Store in less than a month. They even handled App Store rejection responses.

seo.title: DRM Solution
seo.description: Protect e-learning videos with Widevine, FairPlay, and PlayReady multi-DRM.
seo.keywords: DRM, e-learning DRM, video security, Widevine, FairPlay, Catenoid, ZonePlayer

hero.title: Protect Your e-Learning Content
hero.desc: Block piracy and unauthorized distribution with Catenoid and ZonePlayer DRM solutions to keep your valuable educational content safe.

features.title: Catenoid DRM
features.desc: Korea's #1 e-learning DRM solution protecting HLS/DASH streaming content with AES-128 encryption. Supports Widevine, FairPlay, PlayReady multi-DRM.

features.title: ZonePlayer DRM
features.desc: ZonePlayer-based DRM with segment-level encryption for HLS/DASH streaming content. Specialized in screen capture prevention and personal watermarks.

features.title: Screen Capture & Recording Prevention
features.desc: Real-time detection and instant playback stop for OBS, capture tools, and screen recorders across all platforms.

features.title: Personal ID Watermark
features.desc: Real-time insertion of learner name, ID, IP address, and other unique identifiers as visible or invisible watermarks.

features.title: Multi-platform & Browser Support
features.desc: Works without plugins on all OS (Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android) and browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).

features.title: Full LMS API Integration
features.desc: Integrates with Webheads LMS and third-party LMS via REST API for real-time access policy control.

features.title: Device Registration & Concurrent Limits
features.desc: Set per-account device limits and automatically block playback from excess devices.

features.title: Offline Playback Protection
features.desc: DRM encryption is maintained even when content is downloaded for offline learning.

features.title: Threat Detection & Monitoring
features.desc: Real-time detection of abnormal playback patterns, repeated license errors, and foreign IP access.

midCTA.heading: Wondering which DRM solution fits your content?
midCTA.description: We'll analyze your environment and propose the optimal DRM solution for free.

solutionsSection.title: Available DRM Solutions
solutionsSection.desc: We'll recommend the optimal DRM solution for your environment.

solutions.name: Catenoid DRM
solutions.desc: Korea's leading DRM solution with Kollus player-based 5-level content security system and dominant market share in the e-learning industry.

solutions.name: ZonePlayer DRM
solutions.desc: Provides both pre-packaging and real-time encryption. Proven stability in large-scale services like EBS.

faqs.q: Do learners need to install any software for DRM?
faqs.a: No. It works on the EME web standard, so it plays directly in the browser without any plugins.

faqs.q: Which is better, Catenoid or ZonePlayer?
faqs.a: Catenoid for large-scale traffic and CDN integration; ZonePlayer for strong capture prevention and watermarking.

faqs.q: Can DRM be added to an existing LMS?
faqs.a: Yes, via REST API integration with Webheads LMS or third-party LMS including Moodle and Blackboard.

faqs.q: Does DRM work on mobile apps?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide dedicated SDKs for iOS (FairPlay) and Android (Widevine).

faqs.q: Does DRM affect video playback speed?
faqs.a: Imperceptibly. Hardware-accelerated decryption maintains the same quality and speed as normal playback.

testimonials.name: H. Lim
testimonials.content: Before DRM, leaked videos were everywhere. After applying it, not a single one has appeared.

testimonials.name: E. Jo
testimonials.content: Learners used to complain about plugin installations. Now it just plays in the browser — complaints have nearly disappeared.

testimonials.name: J. Seo
testimonials.content: In finance, security audits are strict. Being able to pull DRM status reports from the dashboard makes audits much easier.

seo.title: Channel Talk / SMS
seo.description: Boost learner engagement with Channel Talk LMS integration, bulk SMS/LMS delivery, and automated learning reminder messages.
seo.keywords: Channel Talk, SMS, e-learning alerts, learning reminders, LMS Channel Talk, KakaoTalk

hero.title: Automate Learner Communication
hero.desc: Integrate Channel Talk and SMS with your LMS to automate everything from learning reminders to completion notifications.

features.title: Channel Talk LMS Integration
features.desc: Use Channel.io Open API to map LMS learner accounts 1:1, showing enrollment status and progress in the support chat in real-time.

features.title: Bulk SMS / LMS Delivery
features.desc: Send long (LMS), short (SMS), and MMS messages in bulk through KISA-certified SMS gateways.

features.title: Automated Learning Reminders
features.desc: Set conditions based on progress thresholds, remaining enrollment period, and inactive days to auto-send encouragement messages.

features.title: CRM Segment Integration
features.desc: Dynamically build segments based on LMS learner attributes and send targeted messages per segment.

features.title: Delivery Stats & Analytics
features.desc: Dashboard showing delivery count, reach rate, open rate, and URL click rate by channel.

features.title: Event-based Automation
features.desc: Set up message delivery scenarios triggered by LMS events like enrollment, first login, and course completion.

features.title: KakaoTalk Alerts
features.desc: Send KakaoTalk notification and friend messages via Kakao Business API. Save up to 70% compared to SMS.

features.title: Privacy & Consent Management
features.desc: Collect and store opt-in consent per telecommunications law. Immediately exclude opt-out requests from delivery.

features.title: Push & Email Integration
features.desc: Send mobile app push notifications and HTML emails within the same automation scenario alongside SMS and Channel Talk.

midCTA.heading: Wondering about the right messaging automation for your organization?
midCTA.description: We'll propose a learner communication automation plan for free.

useCasesSection.title:
Use It In
These Scenarios
useCasesSection.desc: Enhance learner experience with automated communication at every stage of the learning journey.

useCases.title: Enrollment Notification
useCases.desc: Automatically send SMS with LMS access URL, ID/PW, and schedule when a new learner registers.

useCases.title: Learning Reminders
useCases.desc: Auto-identify learners with below-threshold progress or 3+ days inactive and send encouragement messages.

useCases.title: Completion Congratulations
useCases.desc: Automatically send congratulations message and certificate download link upon course completion.

useCases.title: Real-time Chat Support
useCases.desc: View learner enrollment status in real-time on the Channel Talk support screen.

useCases.title: Bulk Announcements
useCases.desc: Send important notices to all learners or specific groups via SMS/KakaoTalk.

useCases.title: Satisfaction Survey
useCases.desc: Automatically send satisfaction survey link via SMS after course completion.

useCases.title: Mandatory Training Management
useCases.desc: Auto-extract mandatory training targets and send step-by-step reminder SMS to non-completers.

useCases.title: Certificate Expiry Notice
useCases.desc: Auto-send renewal reminder SMS based on certificate expiration dates.

useCases.title: Pre-class Reminder
useCases.desc: Automatically send access links and preparation details before scheduled events.

faqs.q: Can Channel Talk and SMS be used simultaneously?
faqs.a: Yes, you can use Channel Talk for real-time support and SMS/KakaoTalk for automated delivery simultaneously.

faqs.q: How is SMS pricing structured?
faqs.a: Per-message billing: Short SMS ~15 KRW, Long LMS ~40 KRW, KakaoTalk Alert ~8 KRW. Volume discounts available.

faqs.q: What conditions trigger automated learning reminders?
faqs.a: Various conditions like progress threshold, inactive days, and remaining enrollment period can be set via no-code interface.

faqs.q: How is opt-out processed?
faqs.a: 080 free opt-out number included by default. Opt-out requests immediately remove the recipient from future deliveries.

faqs.q: Can it integrate with my existing LMS?
faqs.a: Webheads LMS integrates instantly. Third-party LMS can also integrate via REST API/Webhook in 1-2 weeks.

testimonials.name: S. Baek
testimonials.content: Setting up auto-SMS for non-completers noticeably increased our completion rates.

testimonials.name: N. Kwon
testimonials.content: After Channel Talk integration, our agents can see learner enrollment status instantly. Support time was cut by more than half.

testimonials.name: J. Yoo
testimonials.content: Switching to KakaoTalk alerts significantly reduced messaging costs, and click-through rates are much higher than SMS.

seo.title: PG Payment Integration
seo.description: Optimized payment integration for e-learning platforms with Toss Payments, KG Inicis, Mobilians, PayTeacher, and global PGs.
seo.keywords: PG payment, e-learning payment, Toss Payments, KG Inicis, online payment integration

hero.title: Seamless Integration with
hero.desc: From Toss Payments and KG Inicis to Stripe and PayPal. Integrate all payment methods needed for your e-learning platform.

features.title: Toss Payments Integration
features.desc: Integrate all major domestic payment methods including credit cards, bank transfers, virtual accounts, and mobile payments via Toss Payments REST API v2.

features.title: KG Inicis Integration
features.desc: Korea's #1 PG provider integration supporting all payment methods.

features.title: Mobilians Integration
features.desc: Integrate carrier billing via Korea's leading mobile payment PG.

features.title: PayTeacher Integration
features.desc: Education-specialized PG solution with tuition installments and parent proxy payments.

features.title: Global PG Integration
features.desc: Multi-currency payments with Stripe, PayPal, Adyen, and other global PGs.

features.title: Subscription Automation
features.desc: Auto-bill monthly or annual subscriptions linked to LMS member accounts.

features.title: Payment Stats & Settlement Reports
features.desc: Real-time dashboard for daily/monthly payments, revenue trends, refund rates, and PG fee analysis.

features.title: Security & Privacy
features.desc: Tokenization for card data with zero server storage. TLS 1.3 encryption.

features.title: Payment Error Monitoring & CS
features.desc: Real-time success/failure monitoring, fraud detection (FDS) alerts, and automated CS support.

midCTA.heading: Wondering about the right payment integration for your platform?
midCTA.description: We'll propose an optimized PG integration plan for your business model — free of charge.

partnersSection.title:
Integrated Domestic &
Global PG Partners
partnersSection.desc: We select and integrate the optimal PG provider for your business model.

faqs.q: How long does PG integration take?
faqs.a: Average 1-2 weeks per PG provider. LMS integration may add about 1 week.

faqs.q: Can multiple PGs be used simultaneously?
faqs.a: Yes, domestic and global PGs can be integrated simultaneously with automatic routing per payment method.

faqs.q: How are subscriptions configured?
faqs.a: Set up subscription products in the admin panel with auto-retry on failure and card expiry pre-notifications.

faqs.q: How is exchange rate applied for international payments?
faqs.a: Real-time exchange rates are automatically applied via global PGs like Stripe. Multi-currency settlement reports included.

faqs.q: How is payment security ensured?
faqs.a: Multi-layer security with PCI-DSS certification, card tokenization, TLS 1.3 encryption, and FDS (fraud detection).

testimonials.name: H. Jang
testimonials.content: Toss Payments integration took less than a week. They even set up subscription automation, eliminating our monthly manual work.

testimonials.name: S. Moon
testimonials.content: Auto-generated settlement reports mean no more Excel work for tax invoices and VAT filing.

testimonials.name: D. Shin
testimonials.content: International students had trouble paying until we added Stripe. Global revenue has noticeably increased.

seo.title: Content Development
seo.description: Professional production of video lectures, interactive content, 2D/3D animation, gamification, and more for e-learning.
seo.keywords: e-learning content, video lectures, interactive content, gamification, mandatory training

hero.title: Whatever the Training Need,
hero.desc: Video, interactive, gamification, animation — our experts design and produce content matched to your learning objectives.

featuresSection.title:
We Handle Every Step
of Content Production

features.title: Video Lecture Production
features.desc: Professional studio multi-cam recording, screen capture, slide-based production and more.

features.title: Interactive Content
features.desc: Branching scenarios, quizzes, and simulations using H5P, Adobe Captivate, and Articulate Storyline.

features.title: 2D / 3D Animation
features.desc: Visualize complex concepts intuitively with 2D motion graphics and 3D animation.

features.title: Gamification Content
features.desc: Embed points, badges, leaderboards, and missions into content to drive continuous learner engagement.

features.title: Responsive Multi-device
features.desc: HTML5-based auto-optimized layouts for all devices.

features.title: Mandatory Training Content
features.desc: 5 types of legally mandatory training, regularly updated with latest amendments.

features.title: AI Voice & Pro Narration
features.desc: Both AI text-to-speech (TTS) and professional voice actor recording services.

features.title: Custom Corporate Design
features.desc: Apply corporate CI/BI to lecture templates for brand consistency.

features.title: Quality Review & Accessibility
features.desc: 3-step quality review by instructional design experts, WCAG 2.1 AA compliant.

midCTA.heading: Not sure what content type you need?
midCTA.description: We'll recommend the optimal content format for your training objectives — free of charge.

contentTypesSection.title:
Custom Production
for Any Field
contentTypesSection.desc: From corporate training to mandatory education, medical, finance, and university courses — we have 500+ production references.

contentTypes.label: Corporate Job Training
contentTypes.desc: Customized content from beginner to advanced skill development

contentTypes.label: Mandatory Training
contentTypes.desc: Harassment, safety, privacy, and other legally required training

contentTypes.label: Medical & Health Education
contentTypes.desc: Clinical simulations, patient safety, infection prevention

contentTypes.label: Gamification Learning
contentTypes.desc: Immersive scenario and mission-based learning experiences

contentTypes.label: Language Education
contentTypes.desc: English, Chinese, Japanese, and other multilingual course production

contentTypes.label: Leadership & Culture
contentTypes.desc: Change management, communication, leadership development content

contentTypes.label: Finance & Insurance
contentTypes.desc: Compliance, ethics, and product training content

faqs.q: How long does content production take?
faqs.a: Simple recording/editing: 2-3 weeks. Interactive/animation content: 4-6 weeks. Bulk production can be parallelized for faster delivery.

faqs.q: Can content be made from existing PPT materials?
faqs.a: Yes, existing PPT materials can be converted into slide-based lectures, screen recording lectures, or interactive content.

faqs.q: Is mandatory training content updated with law changes?
faqs.a: With an annual license, content updates for law amendments are provided at no additional cost, reflected within 30 days.

faqs.q: AI voice or professional voice actor — which is better?
faqs.a: AI TTS for bulk production/fast delivery; professional voice actors for high quality/emotional delivery. Mixing both is also possible.

faqs.q: Is WCAG accessibility compliance required?
faqs.a: Legally required for public institutions and universities. Recommended for private companies for disabled learner support. We comply with WCAG 2.1 AA by default.

testimonials.name: M. Song
testimonials.content: The video quality is clearly different. Employees keep asking if these are external training videos.

testimonials.name: J. Yoon
testimonials.content: After adding interactive content, learner engagement changed dramatically. Branching scenarios are especially effective.

testimonials.name: D. Kang
testimonials.content: Medical procedures are hard to explain in text, but 3D animation makes them much easier to understand.
